text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm cruising through the mall on my day off when I
spot a familiar face in front of a boutique.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How about this ring? It has a nice color, and it's
high-quality. Not a bad choice, if you ask me...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide. You know that's an ear cuff, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh?! It looks exactly like a ring... but it's not...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Sorry, that was a little
disconcerting...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous asked me to help choose a gift for
Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What do I do?! What do I dooo?! My marvelous
sense isn't tingling at all!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Marvelous, is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, goody. So, listen. Mayano won a race! ☆ And
I want to give her a marvelous present to
celebrate. ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
But Mayano says she wants something that'll help
her become a "grown-up woman"!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Whatever could that be? Is it sweet? Is it savory?
Is it hot? Cold? I just don't have a cluuue! ☆
Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I ended up here helping her out.
Taishin's come to lend a hand too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide's always gotta stick her nose in other
people's business... Anyway, where did Marvelous
run off to?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's Marvelous for you, such a free spirit.
Something else must have caught her eye, so let's
just message her later.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Getting back to the matter at hand—we've got to
find something that will help Mayano feel like a
"grown-up woman."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But how do you define an adult woman in the first
place? By her age?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening to Biwa Hayahide, I can't help feeling
she's getting caught up on the specifics.
choice_data_list: Why don't you try a simpler approach?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? Simpler?
choice_data_list: Just go with something you both like.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You have a point. If we don't even like the gift, it
probably won't convey our feelings very well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Okay, Taishin. Let's each find one gift candidate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some time, they both come back holding
potential gifts to compare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has chosen red nail polish, while
Narita Taishin presents a pair of silver earrings.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now for the impartial opinion. Trainer, which do
you think would be the better choice?
choice_data_list: The bold nail polish Hayahide chose.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you concur with my pick?
choice_data_list: Yeah... but what made you go with that?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, I thought back to the outfit I wore for the
recent holiday party.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I had my nails done to match, you see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It was quite fascinating to see how much the color
of your nails can affect your whole look. So, I
thought I'd like for Mayano to enjoy that same
feeling.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I had no idea. So that's how you felt
before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin agrees to the nail polish idea, and
we settle on the gift.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Mayano! Congratulations on your marvelous
victory! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You got me a present?! And it's nail polish?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! This is super grown-up! With this on, I'll definitely look extra mature, don'tcha think? ♪ Thank you all so much! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It looks like our gift was quite a hit. It was
well worth us putting our heads together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ohh... Is that so?
choice_data_list: Sure... but what made you pick those?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I remembered what I got Hayahide for the
recent holiday party.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I gave her a pair of silver earrings too... I figured
they didn't look bad, so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wow. You must've put some thought into finding
an accessory that matched my outfit so nicely.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I was just—anyway, hurry up and make a
decision.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide agrees to the earrings idea, and
we settle on the gift.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Mayano! Congratulations on your marvelous
victory! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You got me a present?! And it's earrings?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! This is super grown-up! Wearing these will make me, like, chic and cool, right? ♪ Thank you all so much! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But what kind of outfit would go well with
these? Pleeease, you've gotta help me pick. ☆

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? You're saying we're not done yet?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Well, it just goes to show how trustworthy
we are. Nothing makes me happier than helping
out the younger students.
